title: KoHs Crystal Tweaks
description: Legit crystal PvP QoL: safe obsidian protection, optional local prediction, seamless visuals, and optimized custom audio.
body:
# KoHs Crystal Tweaks

**Master the Art of the Crystal**

Crystal PvP is fast, chaotic, and demanding. A single mistake can break your combo or cost you a fight. KoHs Crystal Tweaks is a client-side mod designed to make combat smoother, safer, and visually refined.

Whether you are a competitive player or simply looking for a more polished experience, this mod improves the rough edges of vanilla Crystal PvP without violating server rules.

## Play Smarter and Safer

- **Obsidian Shield:** Prevents accidental mining of your own obsidian while holding an End Crystal, avoiding costly mistakes during combat.
- **Smart Interactions:** Improves the consistency between your inputs and server responses, making actions feel more reliable and intentional.

## Visual Improvements

- **Seamless Rendering:** Eliminates visual popping and flickering. Crystals appear and explode smoothly, providing a clearer view of combat.
- **Custom Crystal Styles:** Supports crystal tinting and improved animations, including corrected flotation behavior, for a more modern appearance.
- **Perfect Synchronization:** Ensures what you see on screen accurately reflects server-side events.

![Static Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f333c8fc4c35699c170af63c075b62c7bc90bfc.gif)

## Audio Experience

- **Refined Sound Design:** Custom-tuned explosion audio designed to enhance combat feedback.

> **WARNING:** THIS SYSTEM IS CURRENTLY SOMEWHAT UNSTABLE AND MAY INTRODUCE A NOTICEABLE SOUND DELAY. THIS ISSUE IS EXPECTED TO BE RESOLVED IN A FUTURE UPDATE. ITS USE IS NOT RECOMMENDED IF AUDIO DELAY IS DISTRACTING OR NEGATIVELY IMPACTS YOUR EXPERIENCE.

## Performance and Responsiveness

- **Instant Feedback:** Optional placement prediction improves responsiveness, even under higher latency conditions.
- **Modern Compatibility:** Designed to work efficiently alongside current performance optimization mods.

## Why Use This Mod

This mod is intended for players who want to reduce mistakes, improve timing, and enhance visual clarity without altering core gameplay mechanics. It does not automate gameplay; it ensures your performance is not hindered by inconsistencies.

## Legitimacy and Fair Play

This is a fully client-side quality-of-life mod.

- No automated combat  
- No unfair advantages  
- No server-side modifications  

It only improves how the game is rendered and experienced locally.

## Compatibility

Supports modern Minecraft versions (1.21.x) and is optimized for use with the Fabric Loader.
